title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker23: t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf
close_reason: Resolved merge conflict in t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf by merging runtime stack sizes, flash/NVS settings, and detailed comments from heltec and worker23 variants. Updated gateway board config with SPDX, deadlock-prevention TC_TX, RX stack increases, epoch persistence.
